summary: Phase 3 Notification Contract Fix - All 19 tests PASSED. Verified notification response shape ({notifications, unread_count}), field names (is_read not read), no is_demo field, unread_count accuracy, mark_read/mark_all_read functionality, and command orchestration. Fixed frontend HTTP method bug (PUT→PATCH). MongoDB verified: 0 docs with 'read' field, 0 docs with 'is_demo' field.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend was using PUT method but backend only supports PATCH - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: notification_service.py correctly implements canonical notification lifecycle with is_read field
list_notifications_with_count returns {notifications: [...], unread_count: N} as per frontend contract
MongoDB projection correctly excludes 'read' and 'is_demo' fields from responses
Frontend NotificationCenter.js correctly uses data.notifications and data.unread_count
Frontend correctly uses is_read field for notification state
FIXED: Frontend HTTP methods changed from PUT to PATCH to match backend routes
seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests (quotes, invoices, messages via command/execute). Test agent has project_id=proj_f763e6ef3aaf and client_id=client_0d050a240d04.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Notification Contract Fix verified. All notification endpoints return correct response shape {notifications, unread_count}. All notifications use is_read field (not read). No is_demo field in any notification. MongoDB has 0 documents with stale 'read' or 'is_demo' fields. Frontend HTTP methods fixed from PUT to PATCH.
endpoints_tested: PATCH /api/notifications/{id}/read - marks single notification as is_read=true
PATCH /api/notifications/read-all - marks all notifications as is_read=true
POST /api/command/execute - executes draft, no is_demo in response

notification_contract_verification.is_read_field: PASSED - all notifications have is_read field
notification_contract_verification.unread_count_accuracy: PASSED - matches actual count of is_read:false

frontend_fix_applied.change: Changed HTTP method from PUT to PATCH for markAsRead and markAllAsRead functions
frontend_fix_applied.reason: Backend routes/notifications_v2.py only supports PATCH, not PUT
